'''takoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumoniac|pneumoniac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumoniac|pneumoniac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| takoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækeseth|tækeseth]] || [[word:tækesej|tækesej]] || [[word:tækesesh|tækesesh]] || [[word:tækese|tækese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:takokosoth|takokosoth]] || [[word:takokosoj|takokosoj]] || [[word:takokososh|takokososh]] || [[word:takokoso|takokoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:takosoth|takosoth]] || [[word:takosoj|takosoj]] || [[word:takososh|takososh]] || [[word:takoso|takoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:takofsoth|takofsoth]] || [[word:takofsoj|takofsoj]] || [[word:takofsosh|takofsosh]] || [[word:takofsof|takofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takosotho|takosotho]] || [[word:takosojo|takosojo]] || [[word:takososho|takososho]] || [[word:takosoko|takosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takosoth|takosoth]] || [[word:takosoj|takosoj]] || [[word:takososh|takososh]] || [[word:takoso|takoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takosothol|takosothol]] || [[word:takosojol|takosojol]] || [[word:takososhol|takososhol]] || [[word:takosokol|takosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takosothotho|takosothotho]] || [[word:takosojojo|takosojojo]] || [[word:takososhosho|takososhosho]] || [[word:takosoko|takosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takosothon|takosothon]] || [[word:takosojon|takosojon]] || [[word:takososhon|takososhon]] || [[word:takosokon|takosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takosothoro|takosothoro]] || [[word:takosojoro|takosojoro]] || [[word:takososhoro|takososhoro]] || [[word:takosokoro|takosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
